jobs.name: Weekly Tito's vs Steel 43 tracker
jobs.prompt: Script-only weekly POS tracker for Tito's vs Steel 43 1.75L. The attached script queries the production read-replica read-only, generates Cohasset and Weymouth weekly tracker charts, and writes the exact Slack message with MEDIA attachments to stdout.

jobs.name: Weekly Decoy vs Aviary tracker - Cohasset
jobs.prompt: Script-only weekly POS tracker for Cohasset comparing Decoy Cabernet Sauvignon 750ML (https://pos.usemargin.com/item/2618447) vs Aviary Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon 750ML (https://pos.usemargin.com/item/2640428). The attached script queries production POS read-only data for entity 86 / Cohasset using SUCCESS transactions only, builds 8 rolling 7-day weekly buckets ending at runtime, generates the approved actuals-first chart with Aviary unit share, weekly unit mix, weekly gross profit comparison, and Aviary minus Decoy gross profit, then prints Slack-ready summary text and a MEDIA line for the chart image. Run every Monday at 9am ET and deliver to Slack channel C059SQ4H88H.

jobs.name: Weekly Kim Crawford vs Kuranui tracker - Cohasset
jobs.prompt: Script-only weekly POS tracker for Cohasset comparing Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc 750ML (https://pos.usemargin.com/item/2618467) vs Kuranui Sauvignon Blanc 750ML (https://pos.usemargin.com/item/2635331). The attached script queries production POS read-only data for entity 86 / Cohasset using SUCCESS transactions only, builds 8 rolling 7-day weekly buckets ending at runtime, generates the approved actuals-first chart with Kuranui unit share, weekly unit mix, weekly gross profit comparison, and Kuranui minus Kim Crawford gross profit, then prints Slack-ready summary text and a MEDIA line for the chart image. Run every Monday at 9am ET and deliver to Slack channel C059SQ4H88H.

jobs.name: pd-11061-pr-check-followup
jobs.prompt: Autonomous PagerDuty follow-up for incident Q21PP0PZUQK97Z / PD #11061. Do not schedule more cron jobs. Check GitHub PR https://github.com/Transformity/TransformityPOSFrontend/pull/2734 and Actions run 27150868905. If all PR checks relevant to PR #2734 are terminal and passing enough for merge (Amplify preview pass, unit-test pass, and Stably fix-tests/stably verification either pass or a clear Stably tool blocker is present), fetch PagerDuty notes for Q21PP0PZUQK97Z and add at most one final PagerDuty note if no note already mentions PR #2734 with final check/verification evidence. Use PAGERDUTY_API_TOKEN/PAGERDUTY_FROM_EMAIL from the terminal environment; never print secrets. Final note should summarize root cause, before evidence from Stably run 27148308709 and PR run 27150868905, PR URL, local verification (`bun install --frozen-lockfile`, `oxfmt`, `git diff --check`, `bun run build`), and current PR check status. If checks are still pending, output a concise status only and do not post another PagerDuty note. If fix-tests fails or hangs over 60 minutes from 16:25Z, post at most one concise PagerDuty blocker note only if no similar blocker note exists, naming the stuck/failed job URL and safest next human action. Do not acknowledge, resolve, merge, deploy, or mutate production resources.

jobs.name: PD11211 Stably fix-tests follow-up
jobs.prompt: Autonomous PagerDuty follow-up for incident Q00FXII7PW90OL / PD #11211. Do not recursively schedule cron jobs. Load and follow skill devops/webhook-subscriptions plus references/stably-github-actions-incident-remediation.md and references/stably-backend-gamma-dispatch-hidden-failure.md. Incident title: "Stably tests failed for Transformity/POSBackend - committed by jay-babu". Current evidence already posted in PagerDuty note marker pd-11211-stably-fix-tests-interim: no pd-11211 duplicate worktree/branch existed; PagerDuty had no alerts; source POSBackend deploy commit 8e2bde3 / PR https://github.com/Transformity/POSBackend/pull/1824; downstream frontend Stably run https://github.com/Transformity/TransformityPOSFrontend/actions/runs/27287092075 failed at stably-test-main / stably-test job 80597192371 with no concrete spec/assertion in GitHub log; companion fix-tests job 80599781331 was in_progress; gamma frontend smoke reached normal sign-in page with no console errors. Task: re-fetch PagerDuty notes first and stop silently if a final/blocker note marker pd-11211-stably-fix-tests-final or pd-11211-stably-fix-tests-blocker already exists. Re-fetch GitHub run/jobs/logs using gh auth hosts token if needed (do not print secrets). If fix-tests is still in_progress, report only a concise status and do not post PagerDuty. If fix-tests completed and reveals concrete failing spec/assertion, continue incident remediation per policy: run duplicate guard again, reproduce dynamically before code changes, fix/test/PR only if concrete and reproducible. If fix-tests completed but logs remain unavailable or only show no actionable spec/assertion, re-fetch PagerDuty notes immediately before posting and add one concise PagerDuty blocker note with marker pd-11211-stably-fix-tests-blocker summarizing run URL, log status, and no code/production mutations. If a PR/fix is created and checks pass plus dynamic verification succeeds, add final note marker pd-11211-stably-fix-tests-final with PR and evidence. Never ack/resolve/merge/deploy/rerun workflows or mutate production resources.

jobs.name: Google Meet auto recording/transcription/notes for hosted events
jobs.prompt: Run the Google Meet auto-artifacts script to enable recording, transcription, and Gemini smart notes for same-day and next-day Google Calendar events where Jay is the organizer/host. Script is authoritative and prints only changes/errors.

jobs.name: Shipping delivery watchdog for Jay Slack thread
jobs.prompt: Ignored because no_agent=true. Runs a silent shipping-delivery watchdog script every 4 hours and posts to the origin Slack thread only when a newly delivered package is detected.

jobs.name: pd11248-stably-fix-tests-followup
jobs.prompt: Autonomous PagerDuty follow-up for PD #11248 / incident Q0P8X52NAFEZ5Y. Do not schedule any further cron jobs. Context: PagerDuty incident title: "Stably tests failed for Transformity/TransformityPOSFrontend - committed by rishi517". Triggering main Actions run: https://github.com/Transformity/TransformityPOSFrontend/actions/runs/27377857186, main stably job 80906712699 failed after Stably suite upload with 1/11 failed-tests gate; result URL https://app.stably.ai/project/cmkh7ptwn00aul504i6cxisgi/playwright/history/github-Transformity_TransformityPOSFrontend-27377857186-1; companion main fix-tests job 80909363806 was in_progress at 2026-06-11T21:34Z. Source PR: https://github.com/Transformity/TransformityPOSFrontend/pull/2757, source PR Stably run https://github.com/Transformity/TransformityPOSFrontend/actions/runs/27375372811, source PR fix-tests job 80905948466 was also in_progress. Interim PagerDuty note marker already posted: pd-11248-stably-fix-tests-interim. Follow the loaded webhook-subscriptions Stably main hidden failure guidance: first re-fetch PagerDuty notes; suppress duplicate notes if a note already contains equivalent final/blocker evidence. Fetch the main and PR fix-tests job statuses via gh/API from /root/code/TransformityPOSFrontend/main. If fix-tests is still in_progress and less than ~60 minutes old, do not post another PagerDuty note; final response may just say still pending. If main fix-tests completed, fetch its logs (and PR fix-tests logs if useful) and inspect for concrete failing spec/assertion and any autoheal edits/report. Only create a branch/code changes if logs reveal a concrete product/test failure that can be dynamically reproduced. If logs are unavailable, non-actionable, or only say all failing tests skipped/unfixed/no concrete spec, re-fetch PagerDuty notes immediately before posting one concise blocker note with marker pd-11248-stably-fix-tests-blocker, run/job URLs, status, why code changes are unsafe, and next human action. If you do make a fix, follow full incident workflow: duplicate guard, local dynamic reproduction before fix, implement tests/fix in a proper TransformityPOSFrontend worktree/branch, verify, push PR, poll checks when possible, and post final PagerDuty note marker pd-11248-stably-fix-tests-final with PR/check/repro/verification evidence. Never acknowledge, resolve, merge, deploy, rerun Actions, or mutate production resources.

jobs.name: Plivo retry bridge caller to +17073642112
jobs.prompt: Ignored because no_agent=true. Every 30 minutes for one week, run the Plivo retry bridge caller script. The script places one outbound voice call from +14013951018 to +17073642112, and if the target answers Plivo fetches XML that dials/bridges +14016444251. The script stays silent on no-answer, posts once when an answered/live call is detected, and stops once answered or after a week.
